/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/HelloShishir.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/HelloShishir.dir/HelloShishir_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloShishir.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloShishir.dir/sender.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloShishir.dir/receiver.cpp.o -o HelloShishir  /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.1
